en.text: probably from the same base as G3145 and G3415 (i.e. μάω, to strive); to disclose (through the idea of mental effort and thus calling to mind), i.e. report, declare, intimate

senses.gloss_en: probably from the same base as G3145 and G3415 (i.e. μάω, to strive); to disclose (through the idea of mental effort and thus calling to mind), i.e. report, declare, intimate
